criteria.criterionText: Then thresholds should be loaded from product-owned configuration
criteria.llmObservationSummary: The Gherkin describes this expectation, but no execution evidence (report.md or live-call receipt) was provided to confirm its fulfillment.

criteria.criterionText: And supported threshold fields should include:
criteria.llmObservationSummary: The Gherkin lists the expected supported fields, but no execution evidence (report.md or live-call receipt) was provided to confirm that these fields are indeed supported and correctly handled by the system.

criteria.criterionText: And changing a threshold should not require changing classifier code.
criteria.llmObservationSummary: The Gherkin describes this behavioral expectation, but no execution evidence (report.md or live-call receipt) was provided to confirm that threshold changes can be made without modifying classifier code.
